card_description: Dr. Milton Glaub (meaning "Glaub = belief/faith (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Martian Time-Slip*. Psychiatrist on Mars who treats Manfred Steiner. Name note: Faith-man who treats the faithless. The limits of institutional psychiatry when confronting genuine temporal anomaly. First appears in *Martian Time-Slip*.

reference.brief: Psychiatrist on Mars who treats Manfred Steiner
reference.significance: The limits of institutional psychiatry when confronting genuine temporal anomaly
